name: Facility Identification and Jurisdiction Configuration
description:
As an Environmental Engineer, configure the regulatory identification and jurisdictional assignments for a facility in EPA Tier2 Submit 2025. 

Starting from the Tier2 Submit application, create a NEW facility named 'Gulf Coast Petrochemical Processing' (or edit it if it exists). Navigate through the facility tabs to accurately populate the following fields:
- EPA ID: TXD980625285
- D-U-N-S Number: 078451263
- Latitude: 29.7355
- Longitude: -95.2143
- NAICS Code: 325110
- County: Harris
- Fire Department: Houston Fire Department
- LEPC: Harris County LEPC
- Subject to EPCRA Section 302: Yes
- Subject to EPCRA Section 311/312: Yes
- Subject to CERCLA Section 103: Yes

Once completed, you MUST perform two actions to submit your work:
1. Use File > Create Submission to export the facility data to: C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\facility_configured.t2s
2. Create a summary text file at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\facility_jurisdiction_summary.txt containing a list of the updated fields and their values.
